summary: Design a technical platform using GPT-4o, Google Earth Engine, ISRO Bhuvan, Neo4j, XGBoost, and Hyperledger Fabric to evaluate eligibility of bidders for government procurement by extracting identifiers from submitted documents, verifying reality from sources the bidder cannot control or fabricate, detecting cartels, predicting delivery risk, and producing explainable evaluation reports.
key_steps: Truth Stack Agents fire in parallel
optimization_claims: Delivers a ranked composite score for every bidder
Validates turnover via GST DNA instead of reading a balance sheet
Confirms project existence via satellite instead of accepting an experience letter
Detects cartel manipulation via a director ownership graph
Predicts delivery risk via an ML model trained on real contract outcomes
Rewards EPF-compliant vendors and flags those with worker exploitation signals
constraints_addressed: Slow, inconsistent, and easily manipulated manual reviews
